name: Parsnip-Carrot Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a medium pot.
2. Add garlic and onions; cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Add carrots, parsnips, and chicken stock. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 40 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and puree with a hand blender or transfer to a blender or food processor and puree until smooth.
6. Stir in half and half, parsley, and chives.
7. When ready to serve, ladle into bowls and garnish with bacon.
